channel.title: Posts on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Soyoung Choi

item.title: Initial Post
item.description: Introduction Hello, today I want to talk about blah blah. A increases B (Choi and Seo 2018). Choi and Seo (2018) have explored blah blah. Literature Review Caregiver Palliative Caregiving The following illustrates the histogram of xx: hist(airquality$Ozone, col="blue") References Choi, Soyoung, and JooYoung Seo. 2018. “Effects of Nonpharmacological Interventions for Fatigue in Patients with Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.” Journal of Cardiac Failure 24 (8).

item.title: Initial Post
item.description: Introduction Hello, today I want to talk about blah blah. A increases B [@choi2018effects]. @choi2018effects have explored blah blah. Literature Review Caregiver Palliative Caregiving The following illustrates the histogram of xx: hist(airquality$Ozone, col="blue") References
